name: Evergreen Preschool & Daycare
description: Quality early childhood education in Electronic City, Bengaluru. Playgroup, Nursery, Jr. KG, Sr. KG and daycare for children aged 2–12 years.
address: 1427, 13th Cross Rd, Ananth Nagar Phase 2, Shree Ananth Nagar Layout, Kammasandra, Electronic City, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560100
addressShort: 1427, 13th Cross, Ananthnagar Phase 2, Electronic City, Bengaluru – 560100

hero.heading: Where Every Child Blossoms
hero.subheading: Quality early childhood education in the heart of Electronic City. Play-based learning, caring teachers, and a safe environment your family can trust.

about.heading: Our Story
about.story: Evergreen Preschool and Daycare was founded with a vision to provide a nurturing and stimulating environment where children can learn, grow, and thrive. Located in Ananthnagar, Electronic City, we have been proudly serving families in Bengaluru with high-quality early childhood education.
about.mission: To provide a safe, caring, and stimulating environment that promotes each child's social, emotional, physical, and cognitive development while supporting their natural curiosity and love for learning.
about.vision: To be recognised as a leading preschool and daycare centre that prepares children to become confident, creative, and compassionate individuals ready to embrace future challenges.

values.title: Child-Centred
values.description: We place children at the heart of everything we do, respecting their individuality and unique developmental journey.

values.title: Excellence in Education
values.description: High-quality educational experiences through innovative teaching methods and comprehensive curriculum.

values.title: Partnership with Parents
values.description: Working closely with families to ensure consistent support for children both at home and at school.

values.title: Diversity & Inclusion
values.description: We celebrate diversity and create an inclusive environment where every child and family feels valued.

team.name: Mrs. Sharma
team.bio: Over 15 years of experience in early childhood education leading our team with passion and expertise.

team.name: Mr. Patel
team.bio: Oversees curriculum development ensuring our programmes meet the highest educational standards.

team.name: Ms. Reddy
team.bio: Manages our daycare services with a focus on creating a warm, home-like environment for children.

facilities.title: Modern Classrooms
facilities.description: Spacious, well-lit classrooms equipped with age-appropriate learning materials.

facilities.title: Outdoor Playground
facilities.description: Safe and engaging play area designed to promote physical development and exploration.

facilities.title: Activity Room
facilities.description: Dedicated space for arts, crafts, music and creative expression.

facilities.title: Rest Area
facilities.description: Comfortable, quiet space for children to rest and recharge during the day.

faq.a: Complete an application form, submit required documents (birth certificate, immunisation records), and schedule a visit. We accept children based on availability in the appropriate age group.

faq.q: Do you provide meals and snacks?
faq.a: Yes, nutritious meals and snacks for full-day programmes. Fresh fruits, vegetables and balanced meals daily. Special dietary requirements accommodated with advance notice.
1:4 for Playgroup (2–3 yrs), 1:6 for Nursery (3–4 yrs), 1:8 for Jr. KG (4–5 yrs), and 1:10 for Sr. KG (5–6 yrs).

faq.q: What security measures do you have?
faq.a: Controlled building access, CCTV surveillance, secure pickup procedures, regular safety drills, and staff trained in first aid and emergency procedures.
Yes, transportation for our after-school programme from selected nearby schools. Transport for regular programmes can be arranged based on location and availability.
